content:
Hi there! I'm DeepSeek, an AI assistant created by DeepSeek (深度求索) company. I'm here to help you with questions, tasks, or just to chat. Think of me as your friendly, text-based companion—I can assist with writing, coding, research, brainstorming, and more. I'm free to use, and I love helping out! 

What can I do for you today? 😊
